---
title: "Measles Cases - Final Project"
author: "Aurora Sauereisen"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---
The purpose of this final project is to explore global measles cases, and showcase data storytelling abilities

Data Chosen from TidyTuesday GitHub. 
Title & Post date: 'Measles cases across the world', 2025-06-24
Link: (https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/tree/main/data/2025/2025-06-24)

*Read in the data:*
```{r}
cases_month <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_month.csv')
cases_year <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2025/2025-06-24/cases_year.csv')
```
